task: Follow up on the deleted-board fix after Test Project 1 still showed a linked Mural board in the branch preview.

functions/api/[[path]].js routes branch previews to the passwordless preview Worker when calls use same-origin /api.

change: Mural dashboard integration now resolves API origin from explicit overrides, otherwise uses same-origin /api on pages.dev.
Route-state tests now reject the production Worker hardcode in the Mural dashboard component.

validation.summary: 219 tests passed after rerun without concurrent generated CSS rebuild

issuesAndPivots: A full-suite run started in parallel with npm run lint failed tests/deploy-asset-paths.test.js because lint rebuilt generated CSS while the test was reading generated assets. The generated CSS check passed and npm test passed when rerun on its own.
residualRisks: The protected preview page could not be loaded without Cloudflare Access.
